close_reason: Added toolchains//... to target_platform_detector_spec. Now buck2 run toolchains//:go[go] works without --target-platforms
description:
Verify that the toolchain generation properly supports invocation via buck2 run.

## What to verify

1. `buck2 run toolchains//:go[go] -- version` works
2. `buck2 run toolchains//:go[go] -- list ./...` works
3. Other toolchain subtargets work as expected

## Context

When researching gobuckify integration, we noted that gobuckify uses:
```
buck2 run toolchains//:go[go] -- list ...
```

Our toolchain generation should support this pattern, but we haven't verified it works.

## Why this matters

- gobuckify and other Buck2 Go tooling expect this to work
- Users may want to invoke Go through Buck2 for consistency
- Verifies our toolchain generation is complete
title: Verify buck2 run toolchains//:go works correctly
